title: aspidium patens var. pilosulum
intro: Aspidium patens var. pilosulum, also known as the hairy leathery fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Aspidium. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Aspidium patens var. pilosulum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and body aches, and soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
